title: Ada Health - AI Symptom Assessment Platform
problem: Patients struggle to understand their symptoms and when/where to seek appropriate care. This leads to unnecessary emergency visits or delayed treatment.
solution: AI-powered symptom assessment chatbot that guides patients through questions, suggests potential conditions, and recommends appropriate care pathways.
technology: AI reasoning engine, medical knowledge graph, NLP
regulatory_notes: CE marked as Class IIa medical device. ISO 13485 certified.
varden_fit: Moderate-High — symptom assessment could integrate with Varden's booking flow to route patients to appropriate providers. Technology could be licensed or white-labeled.
notes: One of the most established AI symptom checkers in Europe. Strong regulatory foundation.
